positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,axiom,
    suck(space)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~suck(duster)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    plunger != vacuum).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    space != vampire).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    space != vacuum).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    duster != vampire).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    duster != vacuum).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    duster != plunger).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    vacuum != vampire).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    vacuum(space)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~vacuum(X0) | suck(X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    plunger != vampire).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    space != plunger).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    space != duster).

cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    ~suck(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define vampire(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg
% SZS output start Proof for neg
5. household_appliance(duster) [input(axiom)]
6. ~suck(duster) [input(axiom)]
8. ? [X0] : (household_appliance(X0) & ~suck(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~? [X0] : (household_appliance(X0) & ~suck(X0)) [negated conjecture 8]
13. ! [X0] : (~household_appliance(X0) | suck(X0)) [ennf transformation 9]
16. household_appliance(duster) [cnf transformation 5]
17. ~suck(duster) [cnf transformation 6]
28. ~household_appliance(X0) | suck(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
29. suck(duster) [resolution 16,28]
30. $false [forward subsumption resolution 29,17]
% SZS output end Proof for neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
